_meta.instructions: Fill in the "translation" field for each key below. Translate from English to Swahili. Do not change the key names. Return the completed file to add translations back into the app.

home.tagline.en: Excellence in Premium Consumer Goods Since 2019
home.tagline.translation: Ubora katika Bidhaa za Watumiaji Bora Tangu 2019

home.brandStatement.en: A leading global consumer goods company delivering premium food products across diverse categories with international quality standards.
home.brandStatement.translation: Kampuni inayoongoza duniani ya bidhaa za walaji inayotoa bidhaa za chakula za hali ya juu katika kategoria mbalimbali zenye viwango vya ubora wa kimataifa.

home.taglineStart.en: Excellence in Premium Consumer Goods Since
home.taglineStart.translation: Ubora katika Bidhaa za Watumiaji Bora Tangu

navigation.moneyDropdown.creditCard.msRe.translation: Kadi ya Mkopo ya Zawadi za M&S

products.discoverPremium.en: Discover our premium range of products crafted with care and excellence.
products.discoverPremium.translation: Gundua aina zetu bora za bidhaa zilizotengenezwa kwa uangalifu na ubora.

products.noSubcategories.en: No subcategories available for this category.
products.noSubcategories.translation: Hakuna kategoria ndogo zinazopatikana kwa kategoria hii.

products.bakeryDesc.translation: Bidhaa na keki zilizookwa hivi karibuni.

products.beveragesDesc.translation: Vinywaji vya kuburudisha kwa kila tukio.

products.frozenFoodsDesc.translation: Milo iliyogandishwa kwa urahisi na ladha.

products.snacksDesc.en: Tasty snacks for any time of day.
products.snacksDesc.translation: Vitafunio vitamu kwa wakati wowote wa siku.

about.subtitle.en: Excellence in Premium Consumer Goods Since 2019
about.subtitle.translation: Ubora katika Bidhaa za Watumiaji Bora Tangu 2019

about.story1.en: Founded in 2019, Harvics has grown from a visionary idea into a global leader in premium consumer goods. Our journey is defined by a relentless pursuit of quality and a commitment to innovation.
about.story1.translation: Iliyoanzishwa mwaka wa 2019, Harvics imekua kutoka wazo lenye maono hadi kuwa kiongozi wa kimataifa katika bidhaa za watumiaji wa hali ya juu. Safari yetu inaelezewa na harakati zisizokoma za ubora na kujitolea kwa uvumbuzi.

about.story2.en: We operate across 40+ countries, delivering products that enrich lives and set new standards in the industry. From our humble beginnings to our global presence, our values remain unchanged.
about.story2.translation: Tunafanya kazi katika nchi zaidi ya 40, tukitoa bidhaa zinazoboresha maisha na kuweka viwango vipya katika tasnia. Kuanzia mwanzo wetu mnyenyekevu hadi uwepo wetu duniani, maadili yetu hayajabadilika.

csr.hero.description.en: At Harvics, we are committed to making a positive impact on the world. Our CSR initiatives focus on sustainability, community empowerment, and ethical business practices.
csr.hero.description.translation: Katika Harvics, tumejitolea kuleta athari chanya kwa ulimwengu. Mipango yetu ya CSR inazingatia uendelevu, uwezeshaji wa jamii, na desturi za kibiashara zenye maadili.

csr.initiatives.description.en: We focus on four main pillars to drive sustainable change and create shared value for all stakeholders.
csr.initiatives.description.translation: Tunazingatia nguzo kuu nne ili kuendesha mabadiliko endelevu na kuunda thamani ya pamoja kwa wadau wote.

csr.sustainability.description.en: Reducing our environmental footprint through renewable energy and waste reduction.
csr.sustainability.description.translation: Kupunguza athari zetu za kimazingira kupitia nishati mbadala na kupunguza taka.

csr.community.description.en: Empowering local communities through education, healthcare, and economic development.
csr.community.description.translation: Kuwezesha jamii za wenyeji kupitia elimu, huduma za afya, na maendeleo ya kiuchumi.

csr.education.description.en: Providing access to quality education and scholarships for underprivileged students.
csr.education.description.translation: Kutoa fursa ya kupata elimu bora na ufadhili wa masomo kwa wanafunzi wasiojiweza.

csr.health.description.en: Improving access to healthcare and nutrition in underserved regions.
csr.health.description.translation: Kuboresha upatikanaji wa huduma za afya na lishe katika maeneo yasiyo na huduma za kutosha.

csr.achievements.2022.description.en: Honored for our innovative approach to social responsibility.
csr.achievements.2022.description.translation: Tuliheshimiwa kwa mbinu yetu bunifu ya uwajibikaji wa kijamii.

csr.achievements.2023.description.en: Awarded for our extensive community outreach programs.
csr.achievements.2023.description.translation: Tuzo kwa programu zetu pana za kufikia jamii.

csr.achievements.2024.description.en: Recognized for our commitment to carbon neutrality.
csr.achievements.2024.description.translation: Tunatambuliwa kwa kujitolea kwetu kwa kutoegemea upande wowote wa kaboni.

csr.achievements.description.en: Recognizing our milestones in creating a better world.
csr.achievements.description.translation: Kutambua hatua zetu muhimu katika kuunda ulimwengu bora.

csr.cta.title.en: Join Us in Making a Difference

csr.cta.description.en: Partner with us or learn more about how we are building a sustainable future.
csr.cta.description.translation: Shirikiana nasi au jifunze zaidi kuhusu jinsi tunavyojenga mustakabali endelevu.

contact.subtitle.en: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out to us through any of these channels.
contact.subtitle.translation: Tungependa kusikia kutoka kwako. Wasiliana nasi kupitia njia yoyote kati ya hizi.

media.pageTitle.translation: Kituo cha Vyombo vya Habari | Harvics

media.description.en: Press resources, brand assets, and the latest news from Harvics Global Ventures.
media.description.translation: Rasilimali za vyombo vya habari, mali za chapa, na habari mpya kutoka Harvics Global Ventures.

media.sections.news.title.translation: Habari na Matangazo kwa Vyombo vya Habari

media.sections.news.desc.en: Latest announcements, market expansions, product launches, and corporate updates from Harvics Global Ventures.
media.sections.news.desc.translation: Matangazo ya hivi karibuni, upanuzi wa soko, uzinduzi wa bidhaa, na masasisho ya kampuni kutoka Harvics Global Ventures.

media.sections.gallery.desc.en: High-resolution brand assets, product photography, facility images, and event coverage for media use.
media.sections.gallery.desc.translation: Mali za chapa zenye ubora wa juu, upigaji picha wa bidhaa, picha za kituo, na habari za matukio kwa matumizi ya vyombo vya habari.

media.sections.contacts.desc.en: Reach our communications team for press inquiries, interview requests, and partnership announcements.
media.sections.contacts.desc.translation: Wasiliana na timu yetu ya mawasiliano kwa maswali na waandishi wa habari, maombi ya mahojiano, na matangazo ya ushirikiano.

media.sections.contacts.cta.translation: Wasiliana na Timu ya Waandishi wa Habari

media.recentHeadlines.translation: Vichwa vya Habari vya Hivi Karibuni

media.headlines.expansion.en: Harvics Expands FMCG Operations to 5 New Southeast Asian Markets
media.headlines.expansion.translation: Harvics Yapanua Uendeshaji wa FMCG kwa Masoko 5 Mapya ya Kusini-mashariki mwa Asia

media.headlines.aiPlatform.en: New AI-Powered Supply Chain Platform Launched for Global Distribution
media.headlines.aiPlatform.translation: Jukwaa Jipya la Ugavi Linalotumia AI Lazinduliwa kwa Usambazaji wa Kimataifa

media.headlines.carbonNeutral.en: Harvics Achieves Carbon-Neutral Milestone Across All Facilities
media.headlines.carbonNeutral.translation: Harvics Yafikia Hatua ya Kutokuwa na Kaboni Katika Vituo Vyote

media.headlines.partnership.en: Strategic Partnership with Leading Textile Manufacturers in South Asia
media.headlines.partnership.translation: Ushirikiano wa Kimkakati na Watengenezaji Wakuu wa Nguo Kusini mwa Asia

harvicsHouse.subtitle.en: A Legacy of Excellence and Tradition

harvicsHouse.description.en: Harvics House represents the pinnacle of our commitment to quality and heritage. Here, we bring together the finest selection of our premium products, showcased in an environment that reflects our values of elegance, tradition, and innovation.
harvicsHouse.description.translation: Harvics House inawakilisha kilele cha kujitolea kwetu kwa ubora na urithi. Hapa, tunaleta pamoja uteuzi bora wa bidhaa zetu za hali ya juu, zinazoonyeshwa katika mazingira yanayoakisi maadili yetu ya uzuri, mila, na uvumbuzi.

harvicsHouse.description2.en: Explore our exclusive collections and discover the story behind every product that bears the Harvics name.
harvicsHouse.description2.translation: Gundua makusanyo yetu ya kipekee na ugundue hadithi nyuma ya kila bidhaa yenye jina la Harvics.

footer.tagline.en: Excellence in Premium Consumer Goods Since 2019
footer.tagline.translation: Ubora katika Bidhaa za Watumiaji Bora Tangu 2019

footer.brandStatement.en: A leading global consumer goods company delivering premium food products across diverse categories with international quality standards.
footer.brandStatement.translation: Kampuni inayoongoza duniani ya bidhaa za walaji inayotoa bidhaa za chakula za hali ya juu katika kategoria mbalimbali zenye viwango vya ubora wa kimataifa.

footer.subscribeToAlerts.en: Subscribe to receive alerts and updates
footer.subscribeToAlerts.translation: Jisajili ili upokee arifa na masasisho

footer.speakUp.en: Speak up if you have concerns about compliance or ethics
footer.speakUp.translation: Zungumza ikiwa una wasiwasi kuhusu kufuata sheria au maadili

footer.contactDescription.en: Get in touch with our team

footer.enterEmailPlaceholder.translation: Ingiza anwani yako ya barua pepe

chatbot.welcome.en: Hello! How can I help you today?

chatbot.fallback.default.en: I'm sorry, I didn't understand that. Could you please rephrase?
chatbot.fallback.default.translation: Samahani, sikuelewa hilo. Tafadhali unaweza kulitafsiri upya?

chatbot.fallback.help.en: I can help you with product information, orders, or general inquiries. What would you like to know?
chatbot.fallback.help.translation: Ninaweza kukusaidia na taarifa za bidhaa, maagizo, au maswali ya jumla. Ungependa kujua nini?

chatbot.fallback.contact.en: For more assistance, please contact us at support@harvics.com or call +1-800-HARVICS.
chatbot.fallback.contact.translation: Kwa usaidizi zaidi, tafadhali wasiliana nasi kwa support@harvics.com au piga simu +1-800-HARVICS.

globalWorld.form.emailInvalid.en: Please enter a valid email address
globalWorld.form.emailInvalid.translation: Tafadhali weka anwani halali ya barua pepe

globalWorld.form.marketingConsent.en: I agree to receive marketing communications and updates
globalWorld.form.marketingConsent.translation: Nakubali kupokea mawasiliano na masasisho ya uuzaji

distributorPortal.dashboard.aiAutomation.en: Auto-approval, stock replenishment, and invoice reminders enabled
distributorPortal.dashboard.aiAutomation.translation: Idhini ya kiotomatiki, kujaza tena hisa, na vikumbusho vya ankara vimewashwa

distributorPortal.dashboard.aiRecommenda.en: Based on credit utilization and payment history
distributorPortal.dashboard.aiRecommenda.translation: Kulingana na matumizi ya mikopo na historia ya malipo
SKU zinazopendekezwa na AI kwa kuagiza

distributorPortal.dashboard.actions.comp.translation: Masuala ya muuzaji yanasubiri hatua kuchukuliwa

distributorPortal.dashboard.actions.play.translation: Weka kipaumbele katika usafirishaji unaosubiri kabla ya saa sita mchana.
Funga malalamiko yote yaliyowasilishwa ndani ya saa 48.

distributorPortal.dashboard.actions.play.en: Trigger replenishment for low-stock SKUs (auto-create PO).
distributorPortal.dashboard.actions.play.translation: Kuanzisha upya kwa SKU zenye hisa ndogo (kuunda kiotomatiki PO).

distributorPortal.newOrder.noItems.en: No items added yet. Click "Add Item" to start.
distributorPortal.newOrder.noItems.translation: Hakuna vipengee vilivyoongezwa bado. Bonyeza "Ongeza Kipengee" ili kuanza.

distributorPortal.newOrder.validation.it.en: At least one order item is required
distributorPortal.newOrder.validation.it.translation: Angalau bidhaa moja ya kuagiza inahitajika

distributorPortal.newOrder.validation.pr.translation: Bei ya kitengo lazima isiwe hasi

distributorPortal.newOrder.validation.in.translation: Muundo batili wa tarehe ya uwasilishaji

distributorPortal.newOrder.validation.da.en: Delivery date cannot be in the past
distributorPortal.newOrder.validation.da.translation: Tarehe ya uwasilishaji haiwezi kuwa iliyopita

distributorPortal.profile.validation.inv.translation: Muundo wa barua pepe si sahihi

legal.accessDeniedMessage.en: You don't have permission to access the Legal OS module.
legal.accessDeniedMessage.translation: Huna ruhusa ya kufikia moduli ya Mfumo wa Uendeshaji Kisheria.

legal.dashboardPage.description.en: Overview of legal operations and compliance status
legal.dashboardPage.description.translation: Muhtasari wa shughuli za kisheria na hali ya kufuata sheria

legal.trademarks.description.translation: Dhibiti usajili na maombi ya chapa za biashara

legal.trademarks.errors.saveFailed.en: Failed to save trademark. Please try again.
legal.trademarks.errors.saveFailed.translation: Imeshindwa kuhifadhi chapa ya biashara. Tafadhali jaribu tena.

legal.legalCases.description.en: Manage legal cases and track their status
legal.legalCases.description.translation: Dhibiti kesi za kisheria na ufuatilie hali zao

gps.fleetMap.description.en: Real-time tracking of sales officers and delivery vehicles
gps.fleetMap.description.translation: Ufuatiliaji wa muda halisi wa maafisa wa mauzo na magari ya usafirishaji

competitor.products.description.translation: Fuatilia taarifa za bidhaa za mshindani

competitor.products.errors.createFailed.en: Failed to create product. Please try again.
competitor.products.errors.createFailed.translation: Imeshindwa kuunda bidhaa. Tafadhali jaribu tena.

competitor.dashboard.description.en: Analytics and insights on competitor products
competitor.dashboard.description.translation: Uchanganuzi na maarifa kuhusu bidhaa za washindani

crm.domain.customer360.description.en: Complete customer profiles, interaction history, and relationship management
crm.domain.customer360.description.translation: Kamilisha wasifu wa wateja, historia ya mwingiliano, na usimamizi wa uhusiano

crm.domain.campaigns.description.en: Multi-channel marketing campaigns (IG, FB, TikTok, WhatsApp)
crm.domain.campaigns.description.translation: Kampeni za uuzaji za njia nyingi (IG, FB, TikTok, WhatsApp)

crm.domain.leads.description.en: Lead management, qualification, and opportunity pipeline
crm.domain.leads.description.translation: Usimamizi wa viongozi, sifa, na bomba la fursa

crm.domain.support.description.en: Ticket management, customer service, and issue resolution
crm.domain.support.description.translation: Usimamizi wa tikiti, huduma kwa wateja, na utatuzi wa masuala

crm.domain.loyalty.description.en: Retailer loyalty, gamification, and rewards management
crm.domain.loyalty.description.translation: Uaminifu wa muuzaji, uchezaji, na usimamizi wa zawadi

crm.customerList.customerManagementDescr.en: View and manage your customer relationships, interactions, and campaigns.
crm.customerList.customerManagementDescr.translation: Tazama na udhibiti mahusiano, mwingiliano, na kampeni za wateja wako.

crm.customerList.error.translation: Hitilafu ya kupakia data ya CRM

supplierPortal.dashboard.loading.translation: Inapakia chumba cha rubani cha muuzaji…

supplierPortal.dashboard.action1.en: Confirm upcoming shipments and update GRN schedule.
supplierPortal.dashboard.action1.translation: Thibitisha usafirishaji ujao na usasishe ratiba ya GRN.

supplierPortal.dashboard.action2.en: Review outstanding invoices and share payment advice.
supplierPortal.dashboard.action2.translation: Kagua ankara ambazo hazijalipwa na ushauri wa malipo ya hisa.

supplierPortal.dashboard.action3.en: Resolve open quality complaints with QA evidence.
supplierPortal.dashboard.action3.translation: Suluhisha malalamiko ya ubora wa wazi kwa kutumia ushahidi wa QA.

form.emailInvalid.en: Please enter a valid email address
form.emailInvalid.translation: Tafadhali weka anwani halali ya barua pepe

faq.products.a1.en: We offer a wide range of premium food products including confectionery, beverages, snacks, pasta, bakery items, and frozen foods across multiple categories.
faq.products.a1.translation: Tunatoa aina mbalimbali za vyakula vya hali ya juu ikiwa ni pamoja na keki, vinywaji, vitafunio, pasta, bidhaa za mikate, na vyakula vilivyogandishwa katika kategoria nyingi.

faq.products.q2.en: Where can I buy Harvics products?
faq.products.q2.translation: Ninaweza kununua wapi bidhaa za Harvics?

faq.products.a2.en: Our products are available in retail stores across 40+ countries. Use our store locator or contact page to find a retailer near you.
faq.products.a2.translation: Bidhaa zetu zinapatikana katika maduka ya rejareja katika nchi zaidi ya 40. Tumia kitafuta duka chetu au ukurasa wa mawasiliano ili kupata muuzaji karibu nawe.

faq.products.q3.translation: Je, mnatoa huduma ya kuagiza kwa wingi?

faq.products.a3.en: Yes, we offer bulk order discounts for businesses and retailers. Visit our Bulk Order Discounts page for more information.
faq.products.a3.translation: Ndiyo, tunatoa punguzo la oda ya jumla kwa biashara na wauzaji rejareja. Tembelea ukurasa wetu wa Punguzo la Oda ya Jumla kwa maelezo zaidi.

faq.ordersShipping.q1.translation: Chaguzi zako za usafirishaji ni zipi?

faq.ordersShipping.a1.en: We offer various shipping options including standard, express, and international shipping. Free shipping is available on orders over $50.
faq.ordersShipping.a1.translation: Tunatoa chaguzi mbalimbali za usafirishaji ikiwa ni pamoja na usafirishaji wa kawaida, wa haraka, na wa kimataifa. Usafirishaji wa bure unapatikana kwa oda zaidi ya $50.

faq.ordersShipping.a2.en: Delivery times vary by location. Standard delivery typically takes 5-7 business days, while express delivery takes 2-3 business days.
faq.ordersShipping.a2.translation: Muda wa uwasilishaji hutofautiana kulingana na eneo. Uwasilishaji wa kawaida kwa kawaida huchukua siku 5-7 za kazi, huku uwasilishaji wa haraka ukichukua siku 2-3 za kazi.

faq.ordersShipping.a3.en: Yes, you can track your order using the tracking number provided in your order confirmation email.
faq.ordersShipping.a3.translation: Ndiyo, unaweza kufuatilia agizo lako kwa kutumia nambari ya ufuatiliaji iliyotolewa katika barua pepe yako ya uthibitisho wa agizo.

faq.accountPayments.q1.en: How do I create an account?

faq.accountPayments.a1.en: Click on "Sign In" in the header and select "Create Account" to register for a new account.
faq.accountPayments.a1.translation: Bonyeza "Ingia" kwenye kichwa cha habari na uchague "Unda Akaunti" ili kujiandikisha kwa akaunti mpya.

faq.accountPayments.q2.en: What payment methods do you accept?

faq.accountPayments.a2.en: We accept all major credit cards, debit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers for B2B orders.
faq.accountPayments.a2.translation: Tunakubali kadi zote kuu za mkopo, kadi za benki, PayPal, na uhamisho wa benki kwa maagizo ya B2B.

faq.accountPayments.q3.translation: Je, taarifa zangu za malipo ni salama?

faq.accountPayments.a3.en: Yes, we use industry-standard encryption to protect your payment information.
faq.accountPayments.a3.translation: Ndiyo, tunatumia usimbaji fiche wa kiwango cha sekta ili kulinda taarifa zako za malipo.

faq.returnsRefunds.q1.translation: Sera yako ya kurejesha ni ipi?

faq.returnsRefunds.a1.en: We offer a 30-day return policy for unopened products in original packaging. Please contact our customer service for return authorization.
faq.returnsRefunds.a1.translation: Tunatoa sera ya kurejesha bidhaa ambazo hazijafunguliwa katika vifungashio vya asili kwa siku 30. Tafadhali wasiliana na huduma yetu kwa wateja kwa idhini ya kurejesha.

faq.returnsRefunds.q2.en: How do I request a refund?

faq.returnsRefunds.a2.en: Contact our customer service team with your order number and reason for return. We will process your refund within 5-7 business days.
faq.returnsRefunds.a2.translation: Wasiliana na timu yetu ya huduma kwa wateja ukiwa na nambari yako ya oda na sababu ya kurudisha. Tutashughulikia marejesho yako ndani ya siku 5-7 za kazi.

faq.contactCta.subtitle.en: Our customer service team is here to help
faq.contactCta.subtitle.translation: Timu yetu ya huduma kwa wateja iko hapa kusaidia

careers.description.en: Join Harvics Global Ventures — explore opportunities across 40+ countries.
careers.description.translation: Jiunge na Harvics Global Ventures — chunguza fursa katika nchi zaidi ya 40.

careers.heroTitle.en: Build the Future of Global Trade
careers.heroTitle.translation: Jenga Mustakabali wa Biashara ya Kimataifa

careers.heroDesc.en: We're growing across 40+ countries. Join a team that's building the AI-powered operating system for global commerce.
careers.heroDesc.translation: Tunakua katika nchi zaidi ya 40. Jiunge na timu inayojenga mfumo endeshi unaoendeshwa na akili bandia kwa biashara ya kimataifa.

careers.departments.sales.desc.en: Drive revenue across 40+ markets. Territory management, key accounts, distributor relations.
careers.departments.sales.desc.translation: Kukuza mapato katika masoko zaidi ya 40. Usimamizi wa eneo, akaunti muhimu, mahusiano ya wasambazaji.

careers.departments.supplyChain.desc.en: End-to-end supply chain from factory to shelf. Fleet management, warehousing, last-mile delivery.
careers.departments.supplyChain.desc.translation: Mnyororo wa usambazaji kutoka kiwanda hadi rafu. Usimamizi wa meli, ghala, uwasilishaji wa mwisho.

careers.departments.technology.desc.en: Build Harvics OS — our AI-powered enterprise platform. Full-stack, ML engineering, data science.
careers.departments.technology.desc.translation: Jenga Harvics OS — jukwaa letu la biashara linaloendeshwa na akili bandia. Uhandisi kamili, ML, sayansi ya data.

careers.departments.finance.desc.en: Multi-currency treasury, trade finance, HPay digital payments, FX management across regions.
careers.departments.finance.desc.translation: Hazina ya sarafu nyingi, fedha za biashara, malipo ya kidijitali ya HPay, usimamizi wa FX katika maeneo mbalimbali.

careers.departments.procurement.desc.en: Global sourcing from 15+ origin countries. Supplier audits, quality control, factory-direct programs.
careers.departments.procurement.desc.translation: Utafutaji wa kimataifa kutoka nchi zaidi ya 15 asili. Ukaguzi wa wasambazaji, udhibiti wa ubora, programu za moja kwa moja kutoka kiwandani.

careers.departments.hr.desc.en: Talent acquisition, L&D, performance management across diverse geographies and cultures.
careers.departments.hr.desc.translation: Upatikanaji wa vipaji, L&D, usimamizi wa utendaji katika maeneo na tamaduni mbalimbali.

careers.departments.legal.desc.en: Trade compliance, sanctions screening, IP protection, contract management across jurisdictions.
careers.departments.legal.desc.translation: Utiifu wa biashara, uchunguzi wa vikwazo, ulinzi wa IP, usimamizi wa mikataba katika maeneo mbalimbali.

careers.departments.marketing.desc.en: Multi-language campaigns, 38-locale content, digital marketing, brand strategy for 10 verticals.
careers.departments.marketing.desc.translation: Kampeni za lugha nyingi, maudhui ya lugha 38, uuzaji wa kidijitali, mkakati wa chapa kwa watu 10 wa wima.

careers.benefits.globalMobility.desc.en: Work across Dubai, London, Karachi, Lahore, and 40+ markets
careers.benefits.globalMobility.desc.translation: Fanya kazi kote Dubai, London, Karachi, Lahore, na masoko zaidi ya 40

careers.benefits.growthTrack.desc.en: Fast-track career progression in a scaling enterprise
careers.benefits.growthTrack.desc.translation: Kuharakisha maendeleo ya kazi katika biashara inayokua

careers.benefits.aiCulture.desc.en: Work with cutting-edge AI and real-time intelligence systems
careers.benefits.aiCulture.desc.translation: Fanya kazi na mifumo ya kisasa ya akili bandia (AI) na mifumo ya akili ya wakati halisi

careers.benefits.competitivePackage.desc.translation: Fidia, nyumba, na marupurupu yanayoongoza sokoni

careers.benefits.learningBudget.desc.en: Annual development budget for courses, conferences, and certifications
careers.benefits.learningBudget.desc.translation: Bajeti ya maendeleo ya kila mwaka kwa ajili ya kozi, mikutano, na vyeti

careers.benefits.flexibleWork.desc.en: Hybrid arrangements with regional hub offices worldwide
careers.benefits.flexibleWork.desc.translation: Mipango mseto na ofisi za kitovu za kikanda duniani kote

strategy.description.en: Building a sustainable future through innovation and excellence
strategy.description.translation: Kujenga mustakabali endelevu kupitia uvumbuzi na ubora

strategy.heroSubtitle.en: Building a sustainable future through innovation and excellence
strategy.heroSubtitle.translation: Kujenga mustakabali endelevu kupitia uvumbuzi na ubora

strategy.pillars.globalExpansion.desc.en: Expanding our presence in emerging markets while strengthening our position in established markets
strategy.pillars.globalExpansion.desc.translation: Kupanua uwepo wetu katika masoko yanayoibuka huku tukiimarisha nafasi yetu katika masoko yaliyostawi

strategy.pillars.productInnovation.desc.en: Investing in R&D to develop new products that meet evolving consumer preferences
strategy.pillars.productInnovation.desc.translation: Kuwekeza katika Utafiti na Maendeleo ili kutengeneza bidhaa mpya zinazokidhi mapendeleo ya watumiaji yanayobadilika

strategy.pillars.sustainability.desc.en: Committed to sustainable practices across our supply chain and operations
strategy.pillars.sustainability.desc.translation: Tumejitolea kwa mazoea endelevu katika mnyororo wetu wa usambazaji na shughuli zetu

strategy.pillars.digitalTransformation.d.en: Leveraging technology to enhance customer experience and operational efficiency
strategy.pillars.digitalTransformation.d.translation: Kutumia teknolojia ili kuongeza uzoefu wa wateja na ufanisi wa uendeshaji

strategy.vision.desc.en: To be the world's leading premium consumer goods company, recognized for quality, innovation, and sustainability.
strategy.vision.desc.translation: Kuwa kampuni inayoongoza duniani ya bidhaa za walaji zenye ubora wa hali ya juu, inayotambuliwa kwa ubora, uvumbuzi, na uendelevu.

seo.home.title.en: Harvics Global Ventures | Premium Global Trading
seo.home.title.translation: Harvics Global Ventures | Biashara ya Premium Global

seo.home.description.en: Leading global trading company delivering premium products across 10+ industries. Operating in 50+ countries since 2019.
seo.home.description.translation: Kampuni inayoongoza ya biashara duniani ikitoa bidhaa za hali ya juu katika zaidi ya viwanda 10. Inafanya kazi katika nchi 50+ tangu 2019.

seo.about.description.en: Discover how Harvics Global Ventures became a leading force in global trade across 40+ countries and 10 industries.
seo.about.description.translation: Gundua jinsi Harvics Global Ventures ilivyokua nguvu inayoongoza katika biashara ya kimataifa katika nchi zaidi ya 40 na viwanda 10.

seo.contact.description.en: Get in touch with Harvics offices worldwide across the Middle East, South Asia, Europe, Africa, and the Americas.
seo.contact.description.translation: Wasiliana na ofisi za Harvics duniani kote Mashariki ya Kati, Asia Kusini, Ulaya, Afrika, na Amerika.

seo.products.description.en: Explore Harvics premium product range across FMCG, textiles, commodities, and industrial solutions.
seo.products.description.translation: Gundua aina mbalimbali za bidhaa za Harvics katika FMCG, nguo, bidhaa, na suluhisho za viwandani.

seo.careers.description.en: Join Harvics Global Ventures — explore opportunities across 40+ countries in FMCG, textiles, logistics, and technology.
seo.careers.description.translation: Jiunge na Harvics Global Ventures — chunguza fursa katika nchi zaidi ya 40 katika FMCG, nguo, vifaa, na teknolojia.

seo.media.title.translation: Kituo cha Vyombo vya Habari | Harvics Global Ventures

seo.media.description.en: Harvics media center — press releases, latest news, brand assets, and media contacts.
seo.media.description.translation: Kituo cha vyombo vya habari cha Harvics — taarifa kwa vyombo vya habari, habari za hivi punde, mali za chapa, na mawasiliano ya vyombo vya habari.

seo.strategy.description.en: Harvics strategic vision for global expansion, innovation, sustainability, and digital transformation.
seo.strategy.description.translation: Maono ya kimkakati ya Harvics kwa ajili ya upanuzi wa kimataifa, uvumbuzi, uendelevu, na mabadiliko ya kidijitali.

seo.csr.title.translation: Uwajibikaji wa Kijamii wa Kampuni | Harvics

seo.csr.description.en: Harvics CSR initiatives — environmental stewardship, community programs, and ethical business practices.
seo.csr.description.translation: Mipango ya Harvics CSR — usimamizi wa mazingira, programu za jamii, na desturi za kimaadili za biashara.

seo.faq.title.translation: Maswali Yanayoulizwa Mara kwa Mara | Harvics Global Ventures

seo.faq.description.en: Frequently asked questions about Harvics products, services, ordering, and global operations.
seo.faq.description.translation: Maswali yanayoulizwa mara kwa mara kuhusu bidhaa, huduma, uagizaji, na shughuli za kimataifa za Harvics.

seo.locations.description.en: Harvics offices and operations across the Middle East, South Asia, Europe, Africa, and the Americas.
seo.locations.description.translation: Ofisi na shughuli za Harvics kote Mashariki ya Kati, Asia Kusini, Ulaya, Afrika, na Amerika.

seo.leadership.description.en: Meet the leadership team driving Harvics Global Ventures across 40+ markets and 10 industry verticals.
seo.leadership.description.translation: Kutana na timu ya uongozi inayoendesha Harvics Global Ventures katika masoko zaidi ya 40 na zaidi ya 10 ya sekta.

seo.help.description.en: Get help with orders, accounts, shipping, and Harvics services.
seo.help.description.translation: Pata usaidizi kuhusu maagizo, akaunti, usafirishaji, na huduma za Harvics.

seo.compliance.description.en: Harvics commitment to regulatory compliance, ethical business practices, and global standards.
seo.compliance.description.translation: Kujitolea kwa Harvics kwa kufuata sheria, desturi za kimaadili za biashara, na viwango vya kimataifa.

seo.history.description.en: From a Dubai startup in 2019 to a global enterprise spanning 40+ countries — the Harvics story.
seo.history.description.translation: Kuanzia kampuni changa ya Dubai mwaka wa 2019 hadi biashara ya kimataifa inayohusisha nchi zaidi ya 40 — hadithi ya Harvics.

seo.newsletter.description.en: Subscribe to Harvics newsletter for industry insights and product launches.
seo.newsletter.description.translation: Jisajili kwa jarida la Harvics kwa maarifa ya tasnia na uzinduzi wa bidhaa.

seo.login.description.en: Sign in to your Harvics account to manage orders and access the platform.
seo.login.description.translation: Ingia katika akaunti yako ya Harvics ili kudhibiti maagizo na kufikia mfumo.

seo.research.description.en: Harvics research initiatives and innovation programs driving our global strategy.
seo.research.description.translation: Mipango ya utafiti ya Harvics na programu za uvumbuzi zinazoendesha mkakati wetu wa kimataifa.

seo.investorRelations.description.en: Investor information, financial reports, and corporate announcements from Harvics Global Ventures.
seo.investorRelations.description.translation: Taarifa za wawekezaji, ripoti za fedha, na matangazo ya kampuni kutoka Harvics Global Ventures.

errors.notFound.description.en: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

errors.serverError.description.en: We are sorry, but something unexpected happened. Please try refreshing the page.
errors.serverError.description.translation: Samahani, lakini jambo lisilotarajiwa lilitokea. Tafadhali jaribu kuburudisha ukurasa.

errors.globalError.description.en: A critical error occurred. Please reload the page.
errors.globalError.description.translation: Hitilafu muhimu imetokea. Tafadhali pakia upya ukurasa.
